description: Composition White shorts made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has an elasticated waist with a drawcord, red panels on the side seams, mesh panel at the centre and at the back, attached inner brief, embroidered brand logo on the left leg, Arsenal branding on the right leg and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry Built with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, these nike running shorts come in a body-friendly design. These high-performance shorts feature Dri-Fit technology that wicks sweat away from the skin and keeps you dry and comfortable. Team it with t-shirts and track jackets.
